title: Emergency SOS
subtitle: Get immediate help for urgent home emergencies
descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Water is flooding from under the kitchen sink...
safetyWarning: If you smell gas or see fire, call 911 or emergency services first
safetyAcknowledge: I understand — proceed with contractor dispatch
confirmMessage: This will immediately contact emergency contractors in your area. Are you sure?
successMessage: We're contacting emergency contractors now. You'll be notified when one responds.
duplicateError: An emergency request for this type was submitted within the last 10 minutes
rateLimitError: Too many emergency requests. Please wait before trying again.
noProperty: Please add your property first before requesting emergency service
